index.description: Add a person to the team and get them productive. Output is the person delivering useful work. First-hire, contractor onboarding, vendor selection, role definition, onboarding plans, 30-60-90 plans.

playbook.summary: Stand up a 5-10 person freelance bench callable within 48h, with audition flow, rate card, IP boilerplate, quality-bar mechanism.

"Stand up a 5–10 person freelance bench you can call within 48h, with a documented audition flow, rate card, NDA/IP boilerplate, and quality-bar mechanism. Goal: deliver 2x revenue with no W-2 hires..."
Take a newly signed client (or new stakeholder cohort on an existing account) from contract to confident participant in our weekly demo / report / decision loop with no surprises.
Identified delivery bottleneck to contractor sourced, signed, onboarded, and shipping billable work in week 3.
Identify a recurring delivery bottleneck, scope a contractor role, source 5–10 candidates, pick one, sign a contractor agreement, and run them through onboarding so they ship billable work in week 3.
Signed offer → first merged PR + first on-call shadow within 14 days.

From signed offer to first merged PR + first on-call shadow. New hire understands repo layout, runs the dev loop locally, has ship-ready CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md context, knows incident protocol, and ha...
Open req → first owned feature shipped by day 45 in an in-house product team (not agency client engagement).

"Posting -> sourcing -> structured interview -> offer -> 30/60-day onboarding tuned for in-house product context (not agency client engagement). Output: new hire shipping their first owned feature b..."
New contractor candidate to hire / reject / shortlist decision in under a week with paid trial result.
Candidate take-home / live coding → apples-to-apples rubric score (lint + sec + tests floor identical to team standard).
New task to self-contained contractor brief with context, definition of done, deliverable format, escalation path.
